description.text:
First is to spy from far away, the smallest, so far pretty lame
Second is to gas that of forgotten caves in the city at the end of the game
Third is to cause a furious test subject some furious remains
Fourth is to gather freaks numbered this step to the previous' claims
Fifth is to slay a three-headed menace far, far above limbo
Sixth is to end the world ten times over with full uncured audiences bingo
Seventh is to slay a grayed invincible zombie
Eighth is to frame one of each perfect trophy
Ninth is to slay a spinoff's much memed character, the name of which must be guessed
Tenth, this step 1000 times, this must be stressed
